title: Survival Optimized FPS
description: A survival-focused modpack that ensures optimized FPS for smoother gameplay.
body:
![Survival Optimized FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706a5c896895f0a4134f99baa7527dfd84cbe7ed_0.webp)

## About

**Survival Optimized FPS** aims to provide the smoothest gameplay possible. 

This modpack enhances the **survival experience** while maintaining high FPS for smooth and lag-free gameplay. It includes performance optimizations and carefully selected mods to ensure stability without sacrificing the core survival challenge. With **Xaero's Minimap and World Map**, navigation becomes easier, allowing you to explore, build, and battle mobs more efficiently. Enjoy a seamless and immersive adventure with optimized performance.

Additionally, enjoy improved **dynamic sound** for a more immersive experience and a **tree-cutting mechanic** that makes gathering resources faster and more engaging.

## **This modpack is still experimental**
So I will update it accordingly. Sorry for any delays in updates, as I need to test everything thoroughly before uploading.
